name: Yap State (Micronesia)

colors.symbolism: the star, canoe and circle emblem

description: A blue field bearing a central white emblem: a five-pointed star within a traditional outrigger sailing canoe, enclosed by a white circle evoking the Rai stone money of Yap.
history: Yap is the westernmost state of the Federated States of Micronesia, known for its Rai stone money. Its flag, designed by John Gilinung and adopted on 30 May 1980, depicts a star within a traditional sailing canoe.
